emails.text:
Dear Dr Von Meding,

I hope to provide an update regarding the posterior plots for the Cedar Key model. I have reviewed the materials in detail and believe the current direction is sound. The analysis suggests that we should proceed with the revised approach, although several considerations remain outstanding. I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss this further at your convenience during week 1.

Please let me know whether the proposed timeline is acceptable, and whether any additional documentation would be helpful for the review process.

Best regards,
Goshtasb

Hi Sarah,

Quick update on the posterior plots for the Cedar Key model. I've gone through it and things look pretty reasonable so far. There are a couple of points we should talk about in week 1, mostly around scope and timing.

Let me know when you're free and we can set something up.

Thanks,
Goshtasb

Hey Alex,

posterior plots v1 is done! Take a look when you can.

Thanks,
G
